name: Posture & Gait Assessment
description: A comprehensive 90-minute posture and gait assessment. Filmed from 4 angles in slow motion. Includes full posture analysis, gait breakdown, movement screening, root cause diagnosis, personalised correction plan, 45+ minutes of corrective training, and bonus resources.
serviceOutput: Personalised biomechanics correction plan with corrective exercises

itemOffered.name: Full Posture Analysis
itemOffered.description: Identify compensations, rotations, and load faults in your muscle chains.

itemOffered.name: Gait Breakdown
itemOffered.description: See exactly how your walking pattern influences your pain.

itemOffered.name: Movement Screening
itemOffered.description: Assessment of rib cage, pelvis, foot mechanics, breathing, sling systems and more during walking and running.

itemOffered.name: Root Cause Diagnosis
itemOffered.description: We identify why the issue exists rather than treating the symptoms.

itemOffered.name: Personalised Correction Plan
itemOffered.description: Starting drills, priorities, and next steps trialled in the initial session.

itemOffered.name: 45+ Minutes Corrective Training
itemOffered.description: Hands-on corrective work in your very first session.

name: Book Assessment — Functional Patterns Brisbane
description: Book your 90-minute posture and gait assessment at Functional Patterns Brisbane. Full biomechanics analysis, personalised correction plan, and 45+ minutes of corrective training.
